component.name: DataTable
component.description: Feature-rich data table with sorting, pagination, expandable rows, footer totals, and external toolbar slot.

useCases: Displaying tabular data with sorting and filtering
Paginated data lists with server-side or client-side processing
Financial or reporting tables with footer totals
Master-detail views using expandable row panels

commonPatterns.name: basic-client-table
commonPatterns.description: Simple client-side table with sorting and pagination

commonPatterns.name: table-with-toolbar
commonPatterns.description: Table with an external toolbar for search, filters, and actions
commonPatterns.composition: <DataTable columns={columns} data={data} tableRef={tableRef} toolbar={<DataTableToolbar table={tableRef.current} />} enableSorting enablePagination />

commonPatterns.name: table-with-footer
commonPatterns.description: Financial table displaying a totals row in the footer
commonPatterns.composition: <DataTable columns={columns} data={data} enableFooter footerRow={totalRow} footerLabel="Grand Total" />

commonPatterns.name: expandable-panel
commonPatterns.description: Rows expand to reveal a full-width detail panel
commonPatterns.composition: <DataTable columns={columns} data={data} enableExpansion expansionVariant="panel" renderExpandedPanel={(row) => <DetailView data={row} />} />

commonPatterns.name: nested-rows
commonPatterns.composition: <DataTable columns={columns} data={data} enableExpansion expansionVariant="nested" getSubRows={(row) => row.children} />

commonPatterns.name: server-side-table
commonPatterns.composition: <DataTable columns={columns} data={data} mode="server" search={query} onSearchChange={setQuery} sortingState={sorting} onSortingStateChange={setSorting} paginationState={pagination} onPaginationStateChange={setPagination} pageCount={totalPages} rowCount={totalRows} />

antiPatterns.scenario: Using DataTable for fewer than 5 rows of static data
antiPatterns.reason: DataTable adds significant overhead for simple lists
antiPatterns.alternative: Use Table component directly for simple, static tabular data

antiPatterns.scenario: Nesting a DataTable inside another DataTable
antiPatterns.reason: Creates confusing UX and accessibility issues
antiPatterns.alternative: Use expandable rows with renderExpandedPanel for detail views

antiPatterns.scenario: Using client mode with large server-side datasets
antiPatterns.reason: Loading thousands of rows client-side causes poor performance
antiPatterns.alternative: Use mode="server" with controlled pagination and sorting state

semanticMeaning.client: All data loaded upfront; sorting, filtering, pagination handled in-browser
semanticMeaning.server: Data fetched per page; sorting, filtering, pagination controlled externally

semanticMeaning.panel: Expanded row shows a full-width detail panel below the row
semanticMeaning.nested: Hierarchical sub-rows rendered inline with indent and chevron toggle

slots.toolbar: ReactNode rendered above the table card — typically a DataTableToolbar component for search, filters, column visibility, and actions

parentConstraints: Renders its own Card wrapper; should be placed in a full-width container

interactions.search: Filters rows globally via text input; supports controlled and uncontrolled modes
interactions.sort: Click column header to cycle through ascending, descending, and unsorted
interactions.paginate: Previous/Next buttons, rows-per-page select, and go-to-page input
interactions.expand: Click row to toggle panel or chevron to toggle nested sub-rows
interactions.hover: Expandable rows show hover background accent

responsive.mobile: Table scrolls horizontally within the card; pagination stacks vertically
responsive.desktop: Full table visible with inline pagination controls

accessibility.keyboardSupport: Tab navigates between interactive controls; Enter activates sort headers and pagination buttons
accessibility.screenReader: Column headers announce sort state; pagination announces page position
accessibility.focusManagement: Focus moves through search input, filter/column buttons, sort headers, pagination controls

rules: Always provide columns and data props
Use mode="server" when data exceeds a few hundred rows
Enable only the features needed — sorting, pagination, footer, expansion
Use the toolbar slot to render a DataTableToolbar above the table card for search, filters, column visibility, and actions
Pass tableRef to expose the TanStack table instance to the toolbar
DataTable no longer has built-in title, description, actions, or header controls — these are handled by the toolbar
Footer auto-detects total rows by __rowType, rowType, isTotal, _isTotal flags, or a first-column value of "Total"
Numeric columns are automatically right-aligned; override with column meta.align

aiHints.context: Use DataTable when displaying structured tabular data that benefits from sorting or pagination. For search, filters, column visibility, and header actions, use the toolbar slot with a DataTableToolbar. Pass tableRef to expose the TanStack table instance to the toolbar. For simple static tables without interactivity, use the base Table component instead. Wraps TanStack Table internally.
